symbols.name: SubstituteFunc
symbols.summary: Function type for doing final config tweaking on prepared FcPatterns.

symbols.name: Font
symbols.summary: `PangoXftFont` is an implementation of `PangoFcFont` using the Xft library for rendering.  It is used in conjunction with `PangoXftFontMap`.

symbols.summary: Returns the X display of the `XftFont` of a font.

symbols.name: get_unknown_glyph
symbols.summary: Returns the index of a glyph suitable for drawing @wc as an unknown character.  Use PANGO_GET_UNKNOWN_GLYPH() instead.

symbols.name: has_char
symbols.summary: Determines whether @font has a glyph for the codepoint @wc.  Use pango_fc_font_has_char() instead.

symbols.summary: Gets the FreeType `FT_Face` associated with a font.  This face will be kept around until you call pango_xft_font_unlock_face(). ...

symbols.name: set_default_color
symbols.summary: Sets the default foreground color for a XftRenderer.

symbols.name: set_draw
symbols.summary: Sets the XftDraw object that the renderer is drawing to. The renderer must not be currently active.

symbols.name: unlock_face
symbols.summary: Releases a font previously obtained with pango_xft_font_lock_face().  Use pango_fc_font_unlock_face() instead.
